title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and M.G. Siegler discuss Anthropic's IPO filing, exploring why it matters that Dario Amodei's company is going public before OpenAI, assessing Claude's current capabilities, and questioning whether Anthropic actually requires the capital.
